Package index

All functions

Test of Condition Differences across Situation-Action (s,i) Pairs
covnps()
Extract covariance and p Values from Lavaan Output

Coworker Assertiveness ESJT Dataset

devPSI()
Deviation Action Scoring of PSI matrix
df_f0()
Apply f0() to numeric columns of a data frame
diffFieldOverlays()
Field Overlays for Factors, from a "Difference Score" data structure
diffPSI()
Difference Scoring of nI=2 PSI matrix
ecov()
Effect Covariance Matrix
ecov.lmh()
Expected-Outcome Covariance Matrices for Low, Med, High Subgroups on a Variable of Interest
ecov_big()
Estimate Basic Covariance Elements
ecov_long()
Estimate Action Expected-Outcome Covariance Elements
effectiveN()
Effective N from Weighted Data
esjtCov()
Cluster-Robust Covariance and Correlation Matrix for ESJT Data
esjtFromQualtrics()
Build an ESJT/EXSJT dataset from raw Qualtrics data
evalF()
Evaluate One Markov Step of a Functional Field
expEffects.voi()
Expected Effects of Variable-of-Interest
expOutcomes()
Expected Outcomes Matrix
expOutcomesFF()
Expected Outcomes from Situation Interacting with Functional Field
f0()
Format numbers without the leading zero
fieldEditor()
Interactive field diagram editor
fieldOverlays()
Field Overlays for Different Factors
fieldPolygons()
Field Polygons
fieldResults()
Main Functional Field Results
fieldSequenceWidget()
Interactive Step-by-Step Field Sequence Widget
group_kable()
Render a Wide Data Frame as an HTML Table with Grouped Column Headers
impliedCov()
Implied Covariance Matrix from a Field Model
kable0()
`knitr::kable()` wrapper with stripped leading zeros
labelF()
Auto-generate `fZ_X.Y` parameter labels for a field model
lmhgroups()
Create Low-Medium-High Subgroups at Specified Levels
makeFF()
Functional Field Builder
overtimeESJT
Work-Overtime ESJT Dataset
parView()
Provide Rounded Parameter Estimates
pathXMY()
Path Analysis for X -> M -> Y Structures with Optional Moderation
pathXMY_decompose()
Decompose a Z-moderated X-Y effect into expectation-, valuation-, and direct-moderation components
pathXMY_pairtable()
Side-by-Side Table of Two (or More) pathXMY Parameters
plotField()
Draw one frame of a functional field at a given state
plotFieldSequence()
Plot a Sequence of Functional Field Time Steps
plotPathSchema()
Symbolic path-schema diagram (X to Y, optionally through one M)
plotPathXMY()
Field-style path diagram for an X-M-Y model
plotPathXMY_ZLH()
Two-panel low/high-Z field diagrams for a moderated X-M-Y model
plotPathXMY_routes()
Two-panel expectation vs valuation route diagrams
plotPathXMY_widget()
Interactive toggleable widget for an X-M-Y field across Z levels
plotPathXMY_widget_routes()
Toggleable widget for expectation vs valuation route diagrams
plotsAsWidget()
Wrap a list of ggplots in a navigable Back / Forward HTML widget
pnLevels()
Positive and Negative Levels'
prepField()
Prepare Functional Field
runF()
Iterate a Functional Field Forward
screenModerators()
Fast moderator screen for the three X-M-Y path coefficients
sdESJT()
Standard deviation of ESJT ratings
siWeightedData()
Situation-Action Weighted Data
speedingESJT
Speeding ESJT Dataset
strip0_css()
Emit the funfield decimal-house-style CSS once per HTML document
surgery()
Matrix Surgery
sweighteddata()

vshapes()

vsizes()

sweighteddata()

zPSI()
